t: What a Transformer Retrieves and What It Computes
quotes: is the model retrieving a symbolic rule, selecting within a rule-proposed set, or computing something new?
splits roughly 25% retrieved, 60% selected, 15% composed
h:
A measured theory of the composition core — with incidence calculus, tropical geometry, and semiring Datalog as three interpretations of one object.

  • Every next-token decision classified: retrieved, selected, or computed.
  • Headline: ~25% / 60% / 15% — and the computed core grows with scale.
  • One theory, two temperatures: soft logic at T=1, hard geometry at T=0, one Datalog program under two semirings.

J. Allan Scott — use ←/→ keys or the buttons below. The right pane highlights the matching paper text for each slide.

quotes: how to tell these apart operationally, on a real model, token by token
a flat retrieval store (n-gram successor tables, induction copy-rules, a closed-class grammar skeleton)
h:
• "The capital of France is" = retrieval. But many tokens are assembled on the fly from distributed partial contributions.
  • This paper makes the distinction operational, per token, on real models.
  • Tool: the fieldrun decompiler — splits a transformer into a flat retrieval store (n-grams, induction rules, grammar — reconstructs ~half the predictions with no linear algebra) + a composition kernel.
  • Faithful, not approximate: every tier validated by exact top-1 agreement with reference implementations.

quotes: we classify the model’s argmax token t into three routes
All probes below are explain-only: the decode path is untouched
h:
• RETRIEVED — a single store rule's top-1 is the model's token: pure symbolic lookup.
  • SELECTED — the token is in the rule-proposed candidate set, but no rule picks it: the choice is made elsewhere.
  • COMPOSED — in no rule's output: the irreducible computation.

Four measured quantities organise everything: the participation ratio PR, the normalised margin (distance to the nearest decision facet), the readout multiplicity μt, and the pivotality Dj.

All probes are explain-only — the decode path is untouched, so the numbers describe the real model.

quotes: roughly 25% RETRIEVED, 60% SELECTED, 15% COMPOSED
covers the model’s argmax ∼85% of the time on natural text but only ∼63% on code
h:
• Natural text: ~25% retrieved, ~60% selected, ~15% composed. Most "computation" is disambiguation within a retrieved set.
  • Regime-dependent as expected: store covers 85% of natural text but only 63% of code — code is computed, not retrieved.
  • Replicates across a second architecture family (Pythia 70M–1B) and a different store construction (Table 1).
  • The composed share grows monotonically with scale: 7.8 → 14.8% up the Pythia ladder against a fixed store. Bigger models compute more.

t: A uniform ~45-way sum — magnitude decides nothing
quotes: The participation ratio is PR ≈ 42–49 on Qwen
No source dominates the logit magnitude, ever.
h:
• Obvious hypothesis (retrieved = one dominant circuit) is false.
  • Participation ratio PR ≈ 42–49, route-invariant: even tokens an n-gram rule reproduces perfectly are carried by a ~45-way distributed sum.
  • No source ever dominates the logit. Mechanism: uniformly distributed additive sum + argmax — exactly what superposition predicts.
  • On Pythia, PR tracks head count, not parameter count: it's an architecture-shape parameter.

t: Margin and readout multiplicity separate the routes
quotes: monotone RETRIEVED ≫ SELECTED > COMPOSED
the argmax of a sum that is the argmax of no summand.
h:
• Two nearly-independent axes (r ≈ 0.15, ~2% shared variance):
  • Geometry: exact facet distance is monotone R ≫ S > C — retrieved tokens sit deep in their decision cell, composed tokens hug a facet.
  • Redundancy: ~80% of composed tokens have μt = 0 — no single circuit, in isolation, picks the answer.
Emergence, operationally: the argmax of a sum that is the argmax of no summand.

Survives a confidence control — it's not just "the store covers the easy ones."

t: Composition is NOT a near-miss of the rule
quotes: own prediction for only 14%/8%
composition is a non-local divergence from the rule, not a near-miss
h:
• Natural story: a composed token is the residual drifting just across the facet out of the store's cell.
  • Refuted: the nearest facet is the store's own prediction for only 14% / 8% of composed tokens.
  • For ~85%, the store's prediction isn't even the nearest competitor — composition is a non-local divergence, not a near-miss.
  • The ~14% near-miss residue is one identifiable thing: closed-class / morphological coin-flips (a⊥the, will⊥is) — grammar, not novel computation.

t: Composed is fragile; the causal variable is D vs Δ
quotes: knock out the single top circuit and a composed token flips ∼2.4× as often as a retrieved one
holds as a near-perfect necessary condition
h:
• Route-ordered fragility: knock out one top circuit → flips R 22/26% < S 40/48% < C 54/61% (~2.4×). But margin is the governor — flips collapse 76→41→17% across margin terciles.
  • Redundancy is non-compensatory: backups (μt≥2) confer no protection. Many weak readers ≠ fault tolerance.
  • The linear flip identity flip ⇔ Δ < Dj is a near-perfect necessary condition; logistic control shows μt carries ~zero causal weight — it's a proxy for (Δ, Dj).

t: Near-synonyms cancel; the repair is diffuse
quotes: common-mode evidence cancels
the per-head un-rescue rate is order-1/PR
h:
• Non-truth-functionality is a kernel: as the runner-up becomes a near-synonym (ρ = cos(Ut,Uv*) → 1), pivotality collapses — common-mode evidence cancels. Competition hardness is read directly off the Gram.
  • Rescue: when the identity predicts a flip, downstream recomposition saves the token ~half the time; the cushion scales with margin (14→61%).
  • But the repair is not localisable: per-head un-rescue is order 1/PR (4.0–4.1% vs 2.5–2.8%); 18–34% of rescues survive every single-block ablation. No surgical repair target exists.

t: Exact reconstruction · scaling · a quantisation bridge
quotes: floating-point exact reconstruction
quantise the retrievable tier hard, protect the computed core
h:
• Σblocks = logit to floating point (error ~6×10−6): the static decomposition is exact — the empirical face of the export soundness theorem.
  • Decision is block-sparse (~8–10 of 49 blocks) but circuit-dense below block granularity.
  • μt-redundancy is scale-emergent (appears between 160M and 410M); margin geometry is scale-stable from 70M.
  • Deployment bridge: int4 flip rates R 3.6/2.4% ≪ C 5.9/18.8% — quantise the retrievable tier hard, protect the computed core.

t: Five measured constraints → one object, three views
quotes: We now give a structure with all five properties
h:
Any theory of the core must be:

  • additive (the logit is an exact sum),
  • cardinality-inert (only Dj and Δ matter, not the count μt),
  • carry a non-truth-functional coupling hardening with ρ,
  • decide by weighted threshold beyond Horn clauses,
  • and have a diffuse 1/PR repair layer.

The paper gives one structure with all five properties — seen as logic (T=1), geometry (T=0), or computation (a semiring program).

t: Logic at T=1: Projective Incidence Calculus
quotes: ours is the linear functional
recovered as a PIC incidence frequency
h:
• Bundy 1985: probability isn't truth-functional, but incidence is — track the worlds, recover probability as measure.
  • PIC: incidence sets → linear functionals ⟨·,Uv⟩; set overlap → Gram kernel Gvw; ∩/∪ → weighted threshold.
  • Thm 2: competition hardness is monotone in ρ; classical Boolean calculus = the diagonal-G limit.
  • Thm 4: the model's softmax recovered exactly as a PIC incidence frequency (product of experts) — "probability as proportion of worlds," forty years on.
  • Thm 5: the repair layer is provably diffuse: single-module influence O(1/PR).

t: Geometry at T=0: the tropical decision surface
quotes: is a tropical polynomial in r over the (max, +) semiring
the decision cells no lookup table reproduces
h:
• The max-logit M(r) = maxv(⟨r,Uv⟩+bv) is a tropical polynomial; its hypersurface is the decision boundary; its cells are the Laguerre power diagram (Prop. 1).
  • Prop. 2 — measured: the normalised margin is the exact Euclidean facet distance, computed over all 151,936 tokens.
  • Emergence = interior cells: the winning monomial belongs to no single source.
  • Tropical-rank floor: a lookup table has one monomial per stored key; composition needs monomials not in any table — a gap linear (SVD) rank structurally cannot see.

t: Computation: one Datalog program, two semirings
quotes: exactly Datalog evaluated under a provenance semiring
PTIME data complexity, a unique least fixpoint
h:
• The core's decode is Datalog under a provenance semiring: rules for the retrievable fragment, a flagged dense aggregate for the computed one.
  • Thm 6: log-semiring → sum-product → the softmax; tropical semiring → max-product → the greedy decode. One program, two temperatures.
  • Why Datalog, not Prolog: semiring laws survive (no cut/clause-order), bottom-up least fixpoint matches residual accumulation, and the program is decidable & statically analysable (PTIME data complexity).
  • Conjecture 1 (provenance gap): scalar semirings are exact only on diagonal G — dense G needs geometry-valued provenance.

t: One wall, three measures; one kernel, three roles
quotes: One wall, three measures: participation ratio, tropical rank, treewidth
h:
• Maslov dequantization is the bridge: T logΣexp(L/T) → max L, softmax → argmax. The power diagram is the T→0 limit of the softmax cells.
  • The same irreducible computation appears as: high PR (logic) = high tropical rank (geometry) = high treewidth (computation).
  • The same kernel G is: the non-truth-functionality operator = the facet geometry = the provenance coupling.
  • Retrievable fragment: additive / low-rank / low-treewidth → exports compactly. Computed fragment: diffuse / high-rank / dense-G → no compact symbolic form.

quotes: Every quantitative claim traces to an explain-only probe
h:
• Every quantitative claim traces to an explain-only probe: --attribute, --probe-dla, --probe-facet, --probe-ablate, --probe-reconstruct, --probe-quant, export --logic.
  • Open problems: O1 soundness of coalition inference · O2 support number ~ PR? · O3 derive the ~1.5× repair constant · O4 (central) a geometry-valued provenance semiring carrying G · O5 treewidth as the third wall-measure · O6 cross-scale invariance of G's spectrum.

t: Mostly retrieval, a scale-growing computed remainder
quotes: the central idea is Bundy’s
one kernel G, one wall measured three ways
h:
• A transformer spends most of its labour retrieving and selecting; a small, scale-growing remainder computes something new — now measurable, with an exact geometric and causal characterisation.
  • The three interpretations share one kernel G, one wall measured three ways, and one homomorphism between temperatures. Not analogies — one theory.
  • And the lineage is the point: the central idea is Bundy's — incidence calculus, forty years on, meeting a substrate he could not have had.
